# Olajide Ajao: AI GTM Engineer

> Olajide Ajao is an AI GTM (go-to-market) engineer who builds AI automation and integration systems and engineers outbound/go-to-market infrastructure. He came from a data-analytics background (SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau) and now designs end-to-end automations with n8n, Make.com, LLMs, Supabase, Trigger.dev and Smartlead.

## What he does
- AI automation & integration: connecting tools, orchestrating processes, and using LLMs for repetitive, judgement-light work.
- GTM engineering: sourcing, enrichment, AI personalization, deliverability, and reply handling, built as observable infrastructure.

## Key pages
- Home: https://olajide-gtm.vercel.app/
- AI Automation & Integration: https://olajide-gtm.vercel.app/automation
- GTM Engineering: https://olajide-gtm.vercel.app/gtm
- Work (case studies & builds): https://olajide-gtm.vercel.app/work
- About: https://olajide-gtm.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://olajide-gtm.vercel.app/contact

## Selected work
- AI Content Pipeline: one idea in, SEO-ready posts on every platform out (n8n, OpenAI, DALL·E, Airtable).
- AI Proposal Generation & Delivery: discovery-call notes become a sent, on-brand proposal, human-in-the-loop.
- AI Lead Generation & Outreach Engine: a description of your buyer becomes a queue of ready-to-send, verified outreach.
- The Outbound Engine: turn a description of your buyer into booked conversations.
- Signal-Based Targeting: reach buyers the week they actually start looking.
